# Monkadex

## About
Monkadex is a website created by Simon Aarseth (Simonkamon11) as a tool for all things Pokémon, the main page being a common Pokédex. 

## Important pages

- Homepage/Pokédex: https://simonkamon11.github.io/monkadex/
- Shinytools: https://simonkamon11.github.io/monkadex/shinytools/
- About: https://simonkamon11.github.io/monkadex/about/
